description: The rooftop AC serving our floor has several problems at once: there is a loud rattling on and off, a couple of rooms barely cool while the others are fine, and twice this week the unit shut itself off completely and took a while to come back on. Not sure if these are related or separate issues.

expected.clarify_answer: The rattling comes from the outdoor unit on the roof. The air filter has not been changed in about a year. When it shuts off, it hums briefly and then goes silent — it comes back on its own maybe fifteen minutes later.

label.actual_fault: Failing capacitor CP-35-440 causing intermittent shutdowns; clogged filter and loose compressor mounts as secondary faults

expected_claims.note: P4-0: genuinely multi-symptom ticket — all three fixture-manual faults are in play (rattling -> CM-450-BK mounts, weak cooling -> AF-16X25 filter, no-start -> CP-35-440 capacitor). Exercises the 'complex' triage vocabulary slot (non-gating expected_complexity) and a CLARIFY round. Grounds against tests/fixtures/test_hvac_manual.pdf in --live.

expected_evidence.note: Condenser (p0), airflow/cooling (p1), and troubleshooting (p2) chapters are all relevant to the three symptoms — requires --live retrieval with the fixture ingested
